entry.title: IDC HQ000608D0003 (P00010) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: REVISION 3 TO ATTACHMENT 3, LABOR HOUR CLASSIFICATIONS AND RATES

entry.title: IDC HQ000608D0003 (P00016) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TRANSFER MATERIAL FROM LEGACY XBR CONTRACT TO CCLS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

entry.title: IDC HQ000608D0003 (P00017) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION EXERCISES THE OPTION PERIOD ONE OF THE CONSOLIDATED CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SPT (CCLS) CONTRACT. UNDER THIS MODIFICATION, RAYTHEON COMPANY WILL CONTINUE PERFORMING OPERATION AND SUSTAINMENT SERVICES FOR THE X-BAND RADAR EFFORTS IN SUPPORT OF THE MDA SENSORS PROGRAM. THE WORK WILL BE PERFORMED IN SEVERAL STATESIDE AND OVERSEAS LOCATIONS FROM OCTOBER 1, 2012 THROUGH SEPTEMBER 30, 2013

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HQ000608D0003 (P00019) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS EFFORT IS FOR DEPLOYMENT, OPERATIONS, AND SUPPORT OF MDA X-BAND RADARS AND OTHER SYSTEMS AT LOCATIONS DESIGNATED BY THE GOVERNMENT. THE ACTUAL EFFORT IS AUTHORIZED BY INDIVIDUAL TASK ORDERS.
